name: Tailscale Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures Tailscale network access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT t.id, t.login_name, t.display_name, e.termination_date FROM tailscale_users t JOIN employees e ON t.login_name LIKE '%' || e.work_email || '%' WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND t.status = 'active'
remediation: Remove Tailscale access for terminated employees within 24 hours of termination.
